-- 1 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
2
About the “Segmentation”
Sub-Sequence
Segmentation can happen automatically (ie. someone opts-in for a lead magnet or signs up
to your list via a FB ad or partner traffic).
But it can also come in the form of a “call out” email that gets your prospect on a special “launch list”.
Even if you plan to market your offer to your ENTIRE list, it’s still a good idea to send the call-out email
to your list as it gives your prospect the chance to:
1. 	Get excited about the outcome
2. 	Feel exclusively empowered to achieve it
3. 	Commit towards achieving it in the most friction-free part of your funnel (consistency loop)
About the “Confirmation”
Sequence
The confirmation is the most UNDERLEVERAGED email in most marketing funnels.
Not only is it usually the most opened email in any sequence, but it’s our first real chance to diagnose
and reflect back intent, while adding extra layers of meaning to the previous action.
(ie. opting in for a newsletter, lead magnet, video sequence, etc.)
When we can reflect back motivation and diagnose intent - we quickly build trust, credibility, and that
magic sense of “WOW, this person really gets me” which really sets the stage for the conversion later on.
While this can arguably be accomplished as a video on the landing page confirmation, I highly
recommend using it primarily as an email.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
3
What we’re “Coaching”
When combined, here’s these TWO SUBSEQUENCES are coaching:
1. 	Self-Selection
2. 	Excitement Around Outcome (which includes elements of forgiving past letdowns, and trusting
that *this* time will be different)
3. 	Exclusively Empowered to Achieve it (based on achievements, circumstance, or other pre-con-
ditions that put them at a unique advantage to gain the outcome and allow them to cash in on
“privilege points”)
4. 	Friction-Free Commitment to Outcome: (opening up the “consistency loop” so we can close it in
the Sales Sequence).
5. 	Meaning behind the click (intent, motivation, what they’ll no longer stand for, etc.)
Sources of “Exclusive Empowerment”
1. 	Previous distinctions/accomplishments: author of a best-selling book, already speaks basic
Italian, already has a successful 6-figure business, possesses certain certifications/designations,
already taken the “101” version of your program, etc.
2. 	Situational/Circumstantial/Geographical: ex. Father of a newborn child, works remotely, has
10 hours/week to invest, recently laid off from a corporate job (this can be reframed as a positive
opportunity), etc.
3. 	Things they’ve endured: Already got through the withdrawal phase of caffeine addiction, recov-
ered from a cancer diagnosis, rebounded from bankruptcy (financially or emotionally), etc.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
4
Direct Response 2.0 - Questions to Explore:
1. 	What skills, characteristics, experiences, circumstances, achievements or points of pride,
exclusively empower your prospect to achieve the end result and/or embark on this journey?
(ie. already has a website generating 2K visitors/month, already speaks BASIC French, has only just begun losing their hair, etc.)
2. 	What missteps, regrets, sunk costs, or other sources of disillusionment might they need to for-
give themselves for (or be asked for forgiveness for) BEFORE being able to get excited about the
outcome again?
3. How can any of those previous failures be re-framed as necessary prerequisites for where they are
now?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
5
Additional Questions:
4. 	In what ways, can you add “meaning” to “the click”?
• 	What does it say about them?
• 	Their commitment level?
• 	What they REALLY want?
• 	What they’ll no longer stand for?
5. 	What’s the “moment of highest tension”? (see exercise in Module 2)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 27 --

6
Themeplate 1
Exclusively Empowered
Call Out (MVF1)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
7
ABOUT:
Use this themeplate to invite prospects into the journey, and more importantly,
get them excited about it through a sense of exclusive empowerment.
THEMEPLATE:
[CTA1]
[Big outcome your webinar/series/launch is promising]
[The Moment of Highest Tension]
[CTA2]
[Build up Interest around the “event”]
[Exclusive Empowered Close]
EXAMPLE
Subject: Should you be here?
Body:
Hey!
I just wanted to reach out real quick.
Tomorrow we’ll be kicking off our brand new Profit & Lunch
Workshop.
You’re gonna learn all about how to quickly write those
crazy good, high-converting emails that can make or break
your funnel or course launch.
Y’know…
Leading with the big outcome.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
8
… the type of emails that look harmless enough on a funnel
map, until you realize those harrowing little bastards actu-
ally need tender loving care to grow and mature into auto-
mated, revenue-generating badasses.
… the types of emails that you cause you to drunk-post
messages on FB at 3AM hoping that one of your entrepre-
neurial friends will magically refer you to a *unicorn*... aka
a talented copywriter with immediate availability and won’t
force you to take out a reverse mortgage.
… the kind, that after realizing you can’t hire out, forces you
to push back your launch date by 8 weeks while you rack up
361 star points at the local Starbucks and get to know every
barista by name.
Not a fan of Starbucks rewards? Don’t miss this workshop,
damnit.
-Jo
PS. Is this a *CAN’T MISS*?
Honestly… I have no clue.
You tell me.
I mean… I wouldn’t offer you an extra ticket to a Radiohead
show unless I knew for certain that you enjoyed listless
walks in the rain and waxing philosophical over existential-
ism and other topics that make the average person’s head
spin.
Same goes here.
We’re gonna pack this 60 minute show with an epic set list.
By SPECIFICALLY calling out the
"moment of highest tension", you
build trust and a presupposition
that you know a better way.
We get hyper-specific with things
like Starbucks rewards and Radio-
head to GROUND our copy in the
“real life’ of our prospect. If we’re
coming from a place that looks
familiar, it builds trust that the
“place” we’re talking them is equal-
ly realistic and plausible.
We get hyper-specific with things
like Starbucks rewards and Radio-
head to GROUND our copy in the
“real life’ of our prospect. If we’re
coming from a place that looks
familiar, it builds trust that the
“place” we’re talking them is equal-
ly realistic and plausible.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
9
We’ll play crowd pleasers like:
How copywriting has changed over the last few years, and
how to take full advantage of those recent shifts in your next
launch. (hint: as your software gets smarter, so must you)
The *sneaky* 4-part email sequence that took under 2
hours to write and brought in an extra 150K+ in revenue on
a client’s webinar launch.
Why most people get their closing sequence all wrong (OMG
12 hours left!!), and what to do instead in the final minutes
of your launch to ethically and effortlessly attract more
customers.
But since our *intimate concert hall* aka GoToWebinar
maxes out at 999 happy souls (I always save a seat for mom-
ma)...
You should only make it to the show if…
1. You’re an online entrepreneur, coach, consultant,
expert or influencer who already has a product
you’re muchos proud of (or will in the near future)
and want to be able to 2X, 3X or even 5X sales with
powerful and easy-to-implement launch copy.
This be me. I’m in.
2. You’re an established email or launch copywriter
who charges the big bucks to do this for the people
above -- and want to charge the even bigger bucks
by getting better results in less time.
Dayum. It’s like you read my mind.
3. You won’t miss racking up the Starbucks Points
knowing full well you’ll be able to afford your own
venti 5-shot flat white thank-you-vurry-much.
Still here? Punch your ticket.
By SPECIFICALLY calling out the
"moment of highest tension", you
build trust and a presupposition
that you know a better way.
here’s where we “exclusively em-
power” our prospects. Giving them
the joy of cashing in on their “privi-
lege points” - namely: “already has
a product they’re proud of” and
“established email or launch copy-
writer charging the big bucks”.
An advanced (and optional)
strategy to segment you're regis-
trants. If you're attracting different
buckets to your launch and want to
communicate with them differently
down the line - this is a way to seg-
ment them within the email.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Themeplate 2
The Bieber
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
11
ABOUT:
“That’s all I needed you to say.”
Apologies can be powerful. Think of a situation where a couple has been fighting, and finally one of them
puts aside their pride, and sincerely acknowledges (in full detail) their wrongdoings and apologizes.
This:
1. 	Creates resourcefulness and renewed optimism
2. 	Absolves the other person of any feelings or doubts that they were the one at fault.
That’s what we’re activating here.
Clearing the past so that our prospect can get more present and excited about where we’re taking them.
As a side note - when you apologize on behalf of other things/people/paradigms/oppressors in your indus-
try, it subtly (but powerfully) positions you as a trusted (and benevolent) authority.
THEMEPLATE:
[Apologize]
[Moment of Highest Tension]
[Other ways they’ve tried to solve it]
[Show that it wasn’t their fault]
[Offer an out - a better way]
[The “altruistic CTA]
[Qualify them in an exclusively-empowered way]
[CTA]
[PS: Sell the event with bullets]
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
12
EXAMPLE
Subject: Sorry
Body:
I’m sorry, Ryan.
I’m sorry…
… that the online course you just paid 5K for didn’t warn
you about how hard it would be to execute all those tiny
“email” icons on your funnel map.
… that the success of your funnel (and heck, your entire
business) fully hinges on writing those little *things* and
writing them fast.
… that an expertly-curated concoction of binaural beats,
bulletproof coffee and brain drugs with bad names haven’t
been enough to help you blast through it.
And…
… I’m sorry that your despite your best efforts to DIY, you’ve
been struck down by confusing, over-complicated and
impractical systems written by old (mostly dead) copywrit-
ers who didn’t have to contend with unceasing slack noti-
fications, impossible deadlines, and even more impossible
screaming 6 year olds.
So I’m really… reallllllllly sorry.
And on behalf of all these things that have put you in this
perilous place with the success of your launch dangling in
the balance…
… please accept my special invitation to make it up to you.
When you apologize on behalf of
your industry/market/conventions
- - it frames you as an authority -
and presupposes in a subtle way
that you know a BETTER alterna-
tive. Positions you as an empathet-
ic expert.
Moment of highest tension
An altruistic CTA.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
13
Starting next week, Jo & I will be hosting the Launch & Prof-
it Workshops.
This is a *must attend* if you’re:
1. 	An online entrepreneur, coach, consultant, expert or
influencer who already has a product you’re muchos
proud of (or will in the vurrry near future) and want to
be able to 2X, 3X or even 5X sales with powerful and
easy-to-implement launch copy.
2. 	A talented copywriter who charges the big-ish bucks to
do this for the people above -- and wants to charge the
even bigger bucks by getting better results in less time.
The party gets started next Tuesday.
Click here to stay within blast radius for when the co-
py-bombs start falling.
(sign off)
PS. Here’s a small slice of how we’re gonna solve your
“launch woes” once and for all…
Learn…
• 	How copywriting has changed over the last few years,
and how to take full advantage of those recent shifts in
your next launch. (hint: as your software gets smarter, so
do you).
• 	The *sneaky* 3-part email sequence that took 45 min-
utes to write and brought in an extra 154K in revenue on
our last launch.
• 	Why most people get their closing sequence all wrong
(OMG 12 hours left!!), and what to do instead in the final
minutes of your product launch.
Don’t forget to grab your seat
Exclusive empowerment
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
15
ABOUT:
Sometimes the BEST way to get a commitment, is for the prospect to see that
they’re NOT committed to the opposite.
So by leading with a counter-intuitive invitation to exclude themselves, we get prospects
to realize that they’re in fact committed to the result - and your pre-launch that delivers it.
Send this as the third or FINAL invite into your webinar or launch funnel.
THEMEPLATE:
[CTA with urgency]
[Big outcome the launch is promising]
[Invitation to Opt-Out]
[Frame inaction (of the opt out) as implied belongingness]
[CTA 2]
[Exclusive Empowerment]
[CTA]
[Optional PS to sell the event/launch/video]
[CTA]
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
16
EXAMPLE
Subject: Should I cross you off the list?
Body:
Hey,
We’re kicking things off tomorrow with the first installment
of our Profit & Launch Workshop series.
Just wanted to warn you that I’m gonna be in your inbox.
Like.
A lot.
Mostly talking about online courses, product launches,
evergreen funnels…
… and how to write the kinda killer copy that amplifies
the profits in all of’em.
If that’s not something you can get behind...
(For reals!? Why are you even here?) ← besides you, mom.
Then kindly hit this link so I know NOT to hit you with the
good stuff.
*patiently waits for the room to clear*
…
WHAT!?
Ryan!?
You’re still here?
we’re framing “inaction” as implied
ACTION that they belong on our
launch sequence.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
17
And you haven’t signed up for the VIP PASS that will get you
live updates from the workshop series -- along with exclu-
sive bonuses, perks, and priority access to the grand reveal
next week?
Pshhh…
I’ll assume you accidentally deleted my last few emails in a
fruitless attempt to hit Inbox Zero
(there’s no such thing).
But there is such thing as expertly crafted email copy that
adds EXTRA zeroes to your SamCart or Paypal dashboard.
Especially if you’re an established coach, course creator,
influencer or expert who’s in “funnel mode”...
… or a god-send of a copywriter who does this high-level
stuff for the peeps mentioned above (and wants to get re-
warded handsomely for it).
Wanna see what I mean?
Click here to join the party.
(sign off)
PS.
Tomorrow, we’ll be kicking things off with a bang.
Revealing brand new material that hasn’t been shared any-
where else before.
The kinda copy wisdom that until now, has been reserved
only for our high-level 1-on-1 clients (and the seldom drunk
dial).
Stuff like…
specificity
exclusive empowerment
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

• 	How copywriting has changed over the last few years,
and how to take full advantage of those recent shifts in
your next launch. (hint: as your software gets smarter, so
must you)
• 	The *sneaky* 4-part email sequence that took less than
2 hours to write and brought in an extra 150K+ in reve-
nue on a client’s webinar launch.
• 	Why most people get their closing sequence all wrong
(OMG 12 hours left!!), and what to do instead in the final
minutes of your product launch to lead more prospects
across the finish line.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Segmentation

MODULE 3
19
Themeplate 4
The “What this says
about you” Confirmation
(MVF2)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
20
ABOUT:
Most marketers totally fail to recognize the power of
the confirmation email.
It’s the VERY first thing I look at when working with
new clients, and generally speaking, their current
version is some spin of the following:
“Thanks for signing up, you’re in, we’re gonna have a
lot of fun, awesome, k bye”.
No additional value given. No confirmation of their
decision. No adding meaning to their action. No teas-
ing of what’s to come.
And a whole stack of missed opportunities.
Time for a little upgrade.
GENERAL FORMAT:
This one is less dependent on the structure - and
more dependent on having the right ingredients.
What you want to be “selling” here are the 5C’s:
1. 	Confidence and reassurance in their decision
2. 	Confirm what this says about them (add
meaning to the action).
3. 	Clarity around the outcomes they can expect.
4. 	Curiosity around the WAY the outcome will be
delivered or experienced.
5. 	Credibility that you can deliver it.
THEMEPLATE:
[Congratulate them on the previous action]
[Confirm to them that this is a bigger deal
than they may realize]
[Diagnose what that action tells you about
them - these are positive traits that you get
to remind them of (and urge them to remain
consistent with) later on when you make an
offer]
[Tell them that they’ll be rewarded for that
action]
[What pains/fears/frustrations they’ll soon no
longer have to deal with - Moment of Highest
Tension]
[What pleasures/desires they’ll soon
experience as their new normal]
[Credibility bomb of why they can trust
you to deliver it]
[Create a sense of ease that pre-supposes
they’ll be doing something later Ie. “Nothing
else to do now, but sit back, relax and get
ready to (solve problem)]
[SIgn off]
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
21
EXAMPLE
Subject:
Thanks for confirming. Here’s what that says about you…
Body:
Hey <First Name>,
On behalf of MILLIONS of teens across the country, I wanted
to take a quick second to thank you for signing up for your
free Video Series.
The first video should be landing in your inbox in just a few
minutes.
But first.
Some real talk.
As the parent of a teen, I know things can be crazy tough on
you sometimes.
You want the best for your kid.
Your heart’s in the right place.
Yet despite your sincere, heartfelt efforts to lead them down
a healthy, productive path, you keep smacking up against a
wall of resistance.
Acting out, aggressive outbursts, and stone-cold silence
seems to be the “reward” for your care and concern.
And if you’re feeling unappreciated, fearful, angry, impa-
tient, and even downright resigned or hopeless…
All I can tell you is that this is normal.
You’re NOT alone.
And if you stick around, you’ll soon know how to expertly
navigate your way through it.
Most people will sign up for some-
thing without bringing enough
focus or recognition around their
WHY.
It’s our job as marketers to fill in
that meaning “gap”.
“Here’s what that says about you...”
not only elicits a very primal curi-
osity... but it puts us in a leadership
role right off the bat (we’re assert-
ing ourselves to be in a position to
diagnose their action... even if it
was as simple as putting an email
in a box).
Affirming their decision to join -
and making them realize that this
action was more significant than
they may have initially thought.
A vivid description of not only the
problem/pain itself, but how it
makes them feel (unappreciated,
fearful, angry, etc.) - the moment of
highest tension
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
22
Here’s why I’m hopeful for you, <first name>.
Despite all the challenges in front of you, you still FOUND
this page and had the courage to put your name and email
in that tiny box .
This signals 3 things to me:
1. 	You Still Abso-Freaking-Lutely Care.
2. 	You’re NOT ready to give up.
3. 	You’re ready to empower yourself with the right tools
and techniques to meet the challenges of the modern
day parent.
I’m proud to have you in the family.
And I can’t wait to reward your perseverance with the tools
that will totally TRANSFORM your relationship with a teen in
your life.
Much much more to come.
But for now, keep your eyes peeled for Video #1.
Catch you soon,
(sign off)
P.S. If you’ve experienced any form of acting out or teenage
rebelling over the last few months, the 6 minute video I’m
about to send your way is an absolute MUST WATCH.
P.P.S. Have you shared the love yet?
The quickest way to relieve the pressure is to SHARE the
responsibility.
The more parents, teachers and adults we can empower with
these tools, the less it all falls squarely on our shoulders
Here we fulfill the promise of our
subject line, and powerfully add
MEANING to their click. It’s no
longer a benign action - it’s now
fuelled by these 3 things.
Super important: By declaring
what an action says about your
prospect, we earn the right to hold
them accountable and consistent
to those traits throughout the fun-
nel (and in later emails when we’re
asking for the sale).
More reassurance around their
decision. They feel valued and
appreciated here.
Curiosity around HOW they’ll
achieve the outcome.
End on a more relaxed note that
presupposes they’ll be engaged
and active VERY soon.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
23
Themeplate 5
“What This Says
About You” Webinar
Confirmation
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
24
ABOUT:
This is a variation of the themeplate above, except
for a webinar registration.
Even though someone registered for your webinar, it
is NOT a given that they’re going to show up.
And while it varies across industry, you’d be lucky if
even 25% of your sign ups show up live.
Therefore, it’s kinda crazy that most marketers are
willing to invest ad dollars in getting sign ups to their
webinar only to let their system spit out automated
replies until the day of the presentation.
This themplate is all about 2 things:
1. 	Selling the “show up”
2. 	Pre-Framing the sale.
Like its earlier version, it boils down to 5C’s:
1. 	Confidence and reassurance in their decision
2. 	Confirm what this says about them (add
meaning to the action).
3. 	Clarity around the outcomes they can expect.
4. 	Curiosity around the WAY the outcome will be
delivered or experienced.
5. 	Credibility that you can deliver it.
THEMEPLATE:
[Congratulate them on signing up for the webinar]
[Confirm to them that this is a bigger deal than they may
have initially realized - especially important since most
people aren’t too emotionally invested in a webinar sign
up]
[Diagnose what this tells you about them]
These are positive traits that you get to remind them of
(and urge them to remain consistent with) later on when
you make an offer.
[Remind them again that this is a big deal]
[State WHY it’s a big deal - tying it to your big promise or
sales argument]
[Tell them that they’ll be rewarded for that action]
[Remind them of the big promise - result they’ll get when
they attend]
[What pains/fears/frustrations they’ll soon no longer have
to deal with]
[What pleasures/desires they’ll soon experience as their
new normal]
[Credibility bomb of why they can trust you to deliver it]
[SIgn off]
[P.S. Remind them of the webinar date/time]
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
25
EXAMPLE
Subject:
BOOM! You’re in. Here’s what that says about you…
Body:
You’re in, <first name>!
And I don’t say that lightly.
For in a single click, you just made the bold, irrevocable deci-
sion that:
• 	Your company’s profits (and growth) will never be held
hostage by bad copy (or overbooked + overpriced copy-
writers) again.
• 	Every marketing strategy you ever roll out (Paids Ads,
Webinars, Content, etc.) will always be supported and
amplified by high-converting email copy.
And if you’re a copywriter…
• 	You’ll be armed with the ROI-boosting email skillz that
guarantee you’re never underbooked, never overpriced
(no matter how much you raise your rates)... and always
first in line when a new, A-list clients need a job done.
It’s a pretty big deal.
Cause here’s the truth…
Email copywriting is the single fastest (and least expensive)
way of growing your profits WITHOUT drastically overhauling
your existing strategy.
Signing up for a webinar doesn’t
have the significance that it used
to. It’s highly possible that the click
didn’t pack as much excitement
as you want it to, and therefore it’s
your job right off the bat to add
that significance back.
Adding meaning to the click
while pre-selling the outcomes
the course will deliver.
Adding meaning to the click while
pre-selling the outcomes the
course will deliver.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
26
And by saving your spot for this webinar…
You just put yourself first in line to learn the high impact
email strategies that until now have been exclusively re-
served for private clients like Neil Patel, Amy Porterfield,
Intuit, Invision and Wistia just to name a few.
You’re now part of the fam.
And as such, you’ve earned your right to inherit the wealth.
Nothing else to do for now, but lock it in your calendar and
print out the cheat sheet to make sure that all the strategies
you’ll be learning on Tuesday get put into action immedi-
ately.
See you Tuesday,
Jo & Ry
PS: Once again, here are your webinar details:
DATE 	TIME LINK
PPS.
I used to have this terrible habit of “collecting” webinars.
You know… signing up for them “just in case”, without any
actual intention of showing up.
So I know it’s a “thing”.
And I know there are some amongst us.
I ain’t naming names. Most of you are solid AF…
But if you’re a “just-in-caser” consider this your lucky day.
This *is* that one “case” that you’ll be thanking yourself
later for.
Because what you’ll learn in these 90 minutes can quite liter-
ally impact every aspect of your business moving forward.
We cool?
Cool ;)
Affirming + rewarding their de-
cision to sign up while adding
credibility that the presenters can
deliver the goods
A low resistance CTA... but more
importantly 2 micro-commitments
that generate momentum and acti-
vate the consistency principle.
If they PRINT it out, they’ll be more
likely to see it multiple times be-
tween now and the call (plus, who
wants to waste good paper?)
Remember, we’re selling the
“show up”... and one of the biggest
obstacles to that conversion is the
fact that a good majority of people
signed up “just in case” without
actually fully committing to being
there.
Here we point out the undesir-
able behavior without too much
judgement (admitting we’re guilty
of it too) while promising to reward
their “happy accident”.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 27 --

Segmentation
& Confirmation 	WORKBOOK
MODULE 3
27
Segmentation & Confirmation
Checklist
Have I coached the prospect on:
• 	Why they’re in a better position to achieve the outcome then anyone else?
• 	Pride in previous accomplishments/circumstances?
• 	Self-Selection (have i made self-selecting desirable and frictionless)?
• 	Meaning behind their click?
• 	A frictionless commitment to achieving the new outcome?
• 	Intimate awareness of their “Moment of Highest Tension”
• 	Excitement and renewed optimism around the outcome
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 27 --
